summary: 12 tests passed, 93.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: agents/player.py contains create_player() with the contract signature
completion_promises.evidence: Created agents/player.py with create_player(model_config: ModelConfig, tools: list, system_prompt: str, memory: list[str]) -> CompiledStateGraph. Signature matches the API contract from docs/design/contracts/API-generation.md. Test test_create_player_accepts_contract_parameters verifies parameter names via inspect.signature.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Factory delegates to create_deep_agent with correct kwargs
completion_promises.evidence: create_player calls create_deep_agent(model=model, tools=tools, system_prompt=system_prompt, memory=memory, backend=backend) with all kwargs forwarded correctly. Tests test_delegates_to_create_deep_agent and test_returns_result_of_create_deep_agent verify delegation using patch-at-import-site pattern.

completion_promises.criterion_text: FilesystemBackend is instantiated and passed as backend kwarg
completion_promises.evidence: FilesystemBackend(root_dir='.') is instantiated and passed as backend= kwarg to create_deep_agent. Test test_backend_is_filesystem_backend_with_root_dot uses two-part assertion: (1) mock_backend_cls.assert_called_once_with(root_dir='.') verifies constructor args, (2) assert kwargs['backend'] is fake_backend verifies forwarding.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tools parameter is passed through (expected: 2 tools)
completion_promises.evidence: tools list is forwarded directly to create_deep_agent via tools=tools kwarg. Test test_tools_passed_through_to_create_deep_agent creates 2 mock tools, passes them, and asserts both appear in kwargs['tools'] with len==2.

completion_promises.criterion_text: system_prompt is passed as system_prompt kwarg
completion_promises.evidence: system_prompt parameter is forwarded directly as system_prompt=system_prompt to create_deep_agent. Test test_system_prompt_forwarded_to_create_deep_agent verifies kwargs['system_prompt'] == the provided prompt string.

completion_promises.criterion_text: memory list is passed as memory kwarg
completion_promises.evidence: memory parameter is forwarded directly as memory=memory to create_deep_agent. Test test_memory_forwarded_to_create_deep_agent verifies kwargs['memory'] == ['./AGENTS.md'].

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty system prompt raises a validation error
completion_promises.evidence: create_player raises ValueError('system_prompt must not be empty or whitespace-only') when system_prompt is empty or whitespace. Tests test_empty_system_prompt_raises_value_error and test_whitespace_only_system_prompt_raises_value_error verify both cases with pytest.raises(ValueError, match='system_prompt').
agents/__init__.py already existed with docstring 'Agent factory functions for Player-Coach adversarial cooperation.' — no modification needed, pre-existing file satisfies this criterion.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' on both agents/player.py and agents/tests/test_player.py — 'All checks passed!' with zero errors. Both files use line-length=100 (pyproject.toml) and target-version py311.
